title: Compliance Risk Assessment: Medical Image Analyzer
use_case_summary:
**AI System:** Medical Image Analyzer
**Description:** Analyzes medical images using biometrics
**Domain:** Healthcare
**Personal Data:** No
**Sensitive Data:** No
**Automated Decisions:** No
**Impacts Rights:** No
explanation: The AI use case is classified as high risk due to its use of biometrics in a medical context, which falls under the high-risk AI systems outlined in Article 6(2) and Annex III of the EU AI Act. The obligations triggered include the need for a documented risk management system (Article 9), data governance requirements (Article 10), comprehensive technical documentation (Article 11), and human oversight measures (Article 14). Classification confidence: 85%

recommended_mitigations: Establish and document a comprehensive Risk Management System (RMS) covering the entire lifecycle of the AI system as per Article 9.
Develop a Data Governance Policy and conduct a Quality Assessment Report to meet the data governance requirements outlined in Article 10.
Prepare and maintain comprehensive Technical Documentation in accordance with Annex IV before placing the system on the market, as required by Article 11.
Implement human-in-the-loop operational guidelines to ensure effective human oversight, as mandated by Article 14.
Conduct regular audits and assessments to ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations regarding the use of biometric data.

obligations.description: Establish, implement, document and maintain a risk management system.
obligations.evidence_needed: Documented Risk Management System (RMS) covering the entire lifecycle.
Data Governance Policy and Quality Assessment Report.

obligations.description: Technical documentation must be drawn up before the system is placed on the market.
obligations.evidence_needed: Comprehensive Technical Documentation as per Annex IV.
Human-in-the-loop operational guidelines and UI/UX evidence.
